## CI Safety Net

- [ ] `npm run verify` completed locally.
- [ ] Fresh PC and mobile direct-play were checked.
- [ ] Tutorial progression and skipping were checked.
- [ ] No `console.error` or `pageerror` occurred.
- [ ] Version, changelog, and PWA caches are synchronized.
- [ ] CI passed on the latest exact PR head.
- [ ] The PR title and description match the actual scope.
